summary: The diff implements all four requirements: stable on-chain storage for IP records (REQ-1), Internet Identity auth gate on the Register IP page (REQ-2), public access to the IP Database page (REQ-3), and backend query functions for search/filter (REQ-4). All major acceptance criteria appear covered by the backend main.mo and frontend RegisterIP.tsx changes.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetupModal: A first-login profile setup flow that collects display name, organisation, and email is added, requiring users to create a profile after first login.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention user profiles, display names, or an onboarding modal. This feature was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile storage and retrieval endpoints (getCallerUserProfile, getUserProfile, saveCallerUserProfile) added to the backend.
hallucinated_features.reason: No user profile management was requested in any requirement. The build request is limited to IP record registration and search.

hallucinated_features.description: useRegisterIP mutation configured to work with anonymous actors with no auth dependency at the hook level.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 requires submission to be blocked for unauthenticated users. While the UI auth gate exists, configuring the mutation hook to use anonymous actors was not requested and may weaken the intended auth enforcement.
